name: Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game
author: Poki
description: Johnny Trigger is back in Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game. In this shooter game, you play as a rooftop sniper. Your mission is simple: take down the bad guys below one by one. Be careful however! Once you shoot, the enemies will get spooked and run away - so make sure they don't escape! Also be sure to avoid the civilians and hostages around the map. If you hit them, it's game over! Are you the top-tier sniper that will save the city? How to play Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game? Move the mouse or drag on the screen to aim! Click or tap to shoot! Who created Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game? Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game was created by SayGames. Play their other games on Poki: My Perfect Hotel and Johnny Trigger - Action Shooter ! How can I play Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game for free? You can play Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game for free on Poki. Can I play Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game on mobile devices and desktop? Johnny Trigger - Sniper Game can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
